original:
哲学家(00:16:17): Yeah, so it's a choice at this point.Yeah, Ok, and if I have an advice to you, I know you're greedy.I got it.But I would give up the necessarily and go with the probably you'll see.Make your life easier to understand the the difference between necessarily and probably yes, Ok, so just with probably so in general, if people have love someone, does it mean they have love in their heart or or not?

客户(00:16:43): Yes, good.
translation:
哲学家(00:16:17): 是的，所以此刻这是一个选择。好的，如果我要给你建议，我知道你有些贪心。我明白。但我会放弃“必然”而选择“可能”，你会明白的。让生活更轻松些，去理解“必然”与“可能”的区别。好的，那就只用“可能”吧。那么一般来说，如果人们爱着某人，是否意味着他们心中有爱呢？还是并非如此？

客户(00:16:43): 是的，很好。
